items.text: let's take a look at some tricks to light this environment 让我们看看一些点亮这个环境的技巧吧 setting up your 设置您的 camera and break down this lightsaber impact effect 相机，并分解这个光剑冲击效果 Now for lighting 现在是关于照明的 we've kept it super simple 我们保持了非常简单 So let's double click on our lighting level and then go back to our outliner 所以让我们双击我们的照明级别，然后返回我们的轮廓图 This was made using the environment light mixer 这是使用环境光混合器制作的 So if you go to window environment light mixer 所以如果你去窗口环境光混合器 this is where you can add in a 这是您可以添加的地方 sunlight skylight and sky atmosphere to correctly set up your scene 太阳光、天空光和天空气氛，以正确设置您的场景 But if you want to change the sunlight 但是如果您想改变阳光 all you have to do is go to the directional 您需要做的就是去定向 And if you change the Y pitch 如果您改变Y轴的倾斜度 that will change the time of day the most 这将改变一天中的时间 So by default 所以默认情况下 it's set to negative five 它设置为负五 but I can set this to negative one and 但我可以将其设置为负一 have it set even darker 让它变得更暗 like we're close to dawn 就像我们接近黎明 And that'll correctly update across our entire environment 这将正确地更新整个环境 Now we also have exponential height fog 现在我们还有指数高度雾 which a lot of people end up using this 很多人最终会使用这个 fog density to make a difference 雾密度会有所不同 But one pro tip that I found that you might like is actually changing the height 但是我发现一个专业技巧，您可能会喜欢，那就是实际上改变高度 of your exponential height fog actor 您的指数高度雾演员的高度 This changes how fog is added into the scene 这会改变雾如何添加到场景中 And if you drag it really high up 如果您将其拖得很高 you can get some really interesting 您可以得到一些非常有趣的 looking results 结果 And right now we have volumetric fog set up 现在我们已经设置了体积雾 So we'll even get some cast volumetric shadows 所以我们甚至会得到一些投射的体积阴影 If you want to add in a dust storm element into your scene 如果您想在场景中添加尘暴元素 You can also tweak the clouds by going into the volumetric cloud actor and 您还可以通过进入体积云演员来调整云层 messing with these first three sliders 玩弄这三个滑块 they'll have the biggest impact on your 它们将对您产生最大的影响 And this is all using Unreal's default sky system 这全部都是使用虚幻引擎的默认天空系统 And then to add in lights 然后添加灯光 you can just add in rectangle lights overhead to 您只需添加矩形灯光在上方 mimic soft boxes that you might find on a film set and push these off screen 模仿您可能在电影拍摄现场找到的软盒，并将其推出屏幕外 and above our actors to get some really interesting top light to add dynamic 并在我们的演员上方添加一些非常有趣的顶部光线以增加动态效果 shape across our scene 在我们的场景中形成形状 And then from here 然后从这里开始 you can change the light color 您可以更改灯光颜色 bring in our color picker 打开我们的颜色选择器 and just nudge this color towards our orange sky until it looks natural 将此颜色调整到我们的橙色天空，直到看起来自然 Another thing you can do is add animation to lights 您还可以为灯光添加动画 So we have him slicing through his stomach here 所以我们在这里看到他切开他的胃 But what if we added an additional light for more impact 但是如果我们再增加一盏灯光以增加冲击力呢 All we'd have to do is go to the quick add actors menu 我们所要做的就是进入快速添加演员菜单 grab a point 选择一个点光源 light and just drag it somewhere touching this objects and something like 将其拖动到某个与这些物体接触的地方，然后这样 that could be pretty dynamic 那就可能非常有动态效果 And then all we have to do is change that light color to something more orange 然后我们所要做的就是将灯光颜色更改为更橙色的颜色 to match the color contrast in our scene 以匹配我们场景中的色彩对比度 And then it's really easy to start creating key frames 然后开始创建关键帧非常容易 we don't even have to add it into sequencer 我们甚至不需要将其添加到序列器中 We can just press on this add key frame button here 我们只需按下此处的添加关键帧按钮 And now when we select that point light 现在当我们选择该点光源时 it'll automatically scroll to 它将自动滚动到 that object inside of sequencer 序列器中的该对象 And we can see that they've created a key frame on frame 76. 我们可以看到他们在第76帧上创建了一个关键帧 Now on frame 72 现在在第72帧上 let's set the intensity to zero 让我们将强度设置为零 And as long as we have this auto key frame button enabled 只要我们启用了此自动关键帧按钮 a key frame here 一个关键帧在这里 and now we have them slicing through 现在我们让它们切割 And then at the end 然后在最后 let's fade this off back down to zero 让我们将其淡出到零 And now we can see it animating on and off 现在我们可以看到它的动画效果 And a lot of times it's just simple tricks like this done right 而且很多时候，就是像这样简单的技巧做得正确 that can really start to elevate your scenes 这真的可以开始提升您的场景 just as a reminder 只是作为提醒 all we have to do is play our 我们所要做的就是播放我们的 selected viewport to see exactly what our render result is going to 选择视口以查看我们的渲染结果将是什么 be when we render it out of movie render queue 当我们将其从电影渲染队列中渲染出来时 Now as a last step 现在作为最后一步 let's take a look at how I created this decal 让我们来看看我是如何创建这个贴花的 to create this lightsaber slice going through our character 创建这个光剑切割穿过我们的角色 And now you can use decals to create impacts 现在您可以使用贴花来创建冲击效果 scorch marks 烧焦痕迹 and burn marks like this in your own films 在您自己的电影中制作这样的烧伤痕迹 This could be a bullet impact from lasers or a gun 这可能是激光或枪支的子弹冲击 anything that you can think of 您能想到的任何东西 And it's a lot simpler than you might think because it's actually 这比您想象的要简单得多，因为实际上它是 just using a decal like we were using in our Dark Knight environment 只是使用像我们在《黑暗骑士》环境中使用的贴花一样 So because we're using a decal 所以因为我们使用贴花 I could just move this anywhere 我可以将其移动到任何地方 around inside of the scene 在场景内部四处移动 And the real magic trick that's going on here is I'm just 这里正在进行的真正的魔术是我只是 animating the visibility tracks 动画化可见性轨迹 So literally I'm just flipping it on on frame 74. 所以从字面上讲，我只是在第74帧上翻转它。 And as soon as we time this together with a Niagara particle effects 而且一旦我们将它与Niagara粒子效果配合使用 suddenly this starts to feel like a much bigger deal than it really is 突然间，这件事开始感觉比实际上更重要了 It's really just a decal and a couple of spark effects going off at the same time 实际上只是一个贴花和几个火花效果同时出现 So how could you set this up in any scene of your own going forward 那么你如何在自己的任何场景中设置这个呢？ So to show you just how simple this material is 所以为了向你展示这个材质有多简单 here is everything going on 这里发生的一切 It's literally just plugging in this burn mark texture 实际上只是将这个烧伤痕迹贴图插入其中 which I have right here 我就在这里 which was just something I made by drawing 这只是我画的一个东西 squiggly lines in Photoshop and giving it a little bit of a blur 在Photoshop中画了一些蠕动的线条，并给它稍微模糊了一下 you don't have to overcomplicate a lot of these effects 你不必过于复杂化许多这些效果 as long as it tells the story that you want 只要能讲述你想要的故事 And now we're taking that texture and we're just plugging it into the base 现在我们正在将那个贴图插入到基础材质中 color and the emissive 颜色和自发光 And then I'm taking the alpha channel of this texture 然后我将这个贴图的透明通道 This is the alpha channel 这是透明通道 the black and white mask 黑白掩模 what we want to show in white and what we want to hide in black 我们想在白色中显示什么，想在黑色中隐藏什么 And we're plugging that into the opacity map 然后我们将其插入到不透明度贴图中 And then to turn this material into a decal 然后将这个材质转换为贴花 I'll just change the material 我只需要改变材质 domain over to deferred decal 将域转移到延迟贴花 And to give us transparency 并且给予我们透明度 I'm making this a translucent material 我将其设置为半透明材质 And just by changing those two settings and preparing our texture in this way 只需更改这两个设置并以这种方式准备我们的贴图 that's literally all that we need to do in order to make this decal 这就是我们制作这个贴花所需做的一切 Now to add in this visibility animation 现在来添加这个可见性动画 let me just delete this 让我删除这个 and we'll create it from scratch 然后我们将从头开始创建它 All I'm going to do here is select my decal 我在这里要做的只是选择我的贴花 And one thing you might see is you'd think 你可能会发现一件事，你会觉得 I want to uncheck visibility 我想取消可见性的勾选 That's what I would normally do 那是我通常会做的 But there's no way to key frame this property 但没有办法为此属性设置关键帧 But this actor hidden in game does the same exact thing 但是在游戏中隐藏这个角色会做同样的事情 but it's inverted 但是它是反向的 So when it's disabled 所以当它被禁用时 it's not hidden 它不是隐藏的 And when it's enabled 而当它被启用时 it is hidden 它是隐藏的 Hopefully that's clear 希望这很清楚 So all we have to do here is click on the little key frame icon 所以我们在这里要做的就是点击小的关键帧图标 and then we'll 然后我们将 take this key frame 取出这个关键帧 move it back to frame 73. 将它移动回第73帧 And then on frame 74 然后在第74帧上 we're going to uncheck this 我们要取消勾选这个 So we're making it visible again 所以我们再次使其可见 You can see this made a visibility track 你可以看到这样做了一个可见性轨迹 We're making the decal visible and suddenly we have this complex decal 我们使贴花可见，突然间我们有了这个复杂的贴花 Now the last step here that makes it really unique is we can see that this 现在，使它真正独特的最后一步是我们可以看到这个 decal is animated to the position of our character 贴花是根据我们角色的位置进行动画处理的 And it looks like it stays in the same exact spot 它看起来就像停留在同一个确切的位置 how can we do something like this 我们如何做到这样的效果 Now it's pretty simple as well 现在也很简单 All we're doing is we're taking our decal and we're parenting it 我们所做的就是将贴花放到父级中 So to remove any object from this parent child relationship 所以要解除任何对象之间的父子关系 you just right click 你只需右键点击 on it and then click detach 然后点击分离 And then to reparent it 然后重新设置父级 you just take this burn mark and I'm going to click 你只需将这个烧伤痕迹拿出来，然后点击 and drag it on top of our Vanguard white 并将其拖放到我们的Vanguard white之上 And then I can pick any bone that I want to parent our decal to 然后我可以选择任何我想将贴花父级设置为的骨骼 So in this case 所以在这种情况下 I'm just going to type in hips because it's pretty much 我只需输入hips，因为它基本上 aligned with the hips and then it'll stick to that bone throughout its 与臀部对齐，然后它将始终附着在那个骨骼上 entire lifespan 整个生命周期 And there we go 然后我们就完成了 In just a couple of seconds 仅仅几秒钟的时间 we have a really cool burn mark that's seared 我们有了一个非常酷的烧伤痕迹 into our character here 在我们的角色身上 And by changing out the texture 通过更换贴图 you can have very different effects 你可以得到非常不同的效果 So here we have a lightsaber impact 所以这里我们有一个光剑的撞击效果 but it could also be a black scorch mark 但也可以是一个黑色的焦痕 or it could be a bullet impact by taking a picture of a real life bullet hole 或者它可以是一个真实子弹洞的照片 And by changing out the texture 通过更换贴图 you can have very different effects 你可以得到非常不同的效果 If your machine isn't that powerful 如果你的机器不够强大 a very important tip to know if you 一个非常重要的提示要知道 click on the little hamburger menu up here 点击这里的小汉堡菜单 sometimes you'll have to disable 有时你需要禁用 this real time override 这个实时覆盖 but that will let you toggle real time on and off 但这将允许您切换实时开和关 So if you see this yellow title that says real time off 所以如果你看到这个说实时关闭的黄色标题 you're not rendering your current scene and you can just click on that little 你没有渲染你当前的场景，你只需点击那个小的 icon to start rendering again 重新开始渲染的图标 if it's checked on 如果选中 that means we're rendering the scene every 这意味着我们正在每一帧渲染场景 single frame when Unreal is open 当Unreal打开时，每一帧都会渲染 whether you're looking at it or not 无论你是否在看 whether you're in the bathroom or you're just watching YouTube tutorials 无论你是在洗手间还是只是在看YouTube教程 on another monitor 在另一台显示器上 you're rendering your viewport every single frame 你每一帧都在渲染视口 And this can start to tax your machine quite a bit if you're not actively 如果你不主动使用，这可能会对你的机器造成相当大的负担 using Unreal and the Unreal viewport 使用Unreal和Unreal视口 So turn this off if you don't need it 如果不需要，关闭它 That means it will not render 这意味着它不会渲染 And when you play back in Sequencer 当你在Sequencer中回放时 it starts glitching out and doing some 它开始出现故障并做一些 unexpected things 意想不到的事情 It's probably because you checked real time off 这可能是因为你关闭了实时模式 but that's a good thing 但这是一件好事 You only want to render when you need to 只有在需要时才要渲染 the last thing we should talk about is our camera 我们应该讨论的最后一件事是我们的相机 How can we set this up in the best way 我们如何以最佳方式设置这个 How can we add autofocus and even have the camera aim at our actors 我们如何添加自动对焦，甚至让相机对准我们的演员 So let's do that right now 所以现在让我们来做这个 So if we go into our Cine Camera actor and you scroll down here 所以如果我们进入我们的Cine Camera角色，然后在这里向下滚动 we'll want to find the focus settings so we can set up our autofocus 我们想要找到对焦设置，以便设置自动对焦 So to do this 所以要做到这一点 we want to change our focus method to tracking 我们想要将对焦方式更改为跟踪 and then the actor to track 然后是要跟踪的角色 We can use this pick actor icon and just select whatever actor we want 我们可以使用这个选择角色的图标，然后选择我们想要的任何角色 Now we can preview our focus plane by pressing on the draw debug focus plane 现在我们可以通过按下绘制调试对焦平面来预览我们的对焦平面 And this will create a purple plane showing exactly how far we're autofocusing 这将创建一个紫色平面，显示我们的自动对焦距离 in our scene 在我们的场景中 But when we scrub back and forth 但是当我们来回切换时 you can see that it actually doesn't really stick 你会发现它实际上并不会真正固定 to the actor 对演员 And this can be a little bit confusing at first 这可能一开始会有点困惑 At least we know that the focus is working 至少我们知道对焦是有效的 but clearly it's not sticking 但显然它没有固定 to our actor 对我们的演员 And the reason why is that this is actually focusing on the pivot point 原因是它实际上是在对焦于枢轴点 of the actors 演员的枢轴点 The autofocus will always be set to the pivot point 自动对焦将始终设置为枢轴点 So to fix this 所以要解决这个问题 there's a really simple fix 有一个非常简单的解决方法 all we're going to do is pop into the animation level here 我们要做的就是进入这里的动画级别 And then we're going to add in an empty actor 然后我们要添加一个空的角色 And what I'm going to do is I'm going to right click on this actor 然后我要右键点击这个角色 and move it into our character folder 并将其移动到我们的角色文件夹中 So now this actor 所以现在这个角色 I'm going to rename it by pressing F2. 我要按F2重命名它 I'm going to call this a focus actor 我要将它称为对焦角色 And then what I'm going to do is just drag and drop this onto our 然后我要做的就是将其拖放到我们的 Vanguard blueprint Vanguard蓝图 And from here 从这里开始 we can select what bone in the rig we want 我们可以选择我们想要的骨骼 to parent this focus actor to 将此对焦角色作为父级 to the head of our warrior 到我们战士的头部 And then lastly 然后最后 once that actor is parented 一旦该角色成为父级 let's reset our transform 让我们重置我们的变换 And we'll see that it'll snap to the bone position of the head 我们会看到它会捕捉到头部的骨骼位置 Now you can probably see where this is going 现在你可能能看出这是怎么回事 Instead of tracking on the Vanguard blueprint 而不是在Vanguard蓝图上进行跟踪 let's track the focus actor 让我们跟踪对焦角色 So I'm just going to click here and type in focus actor 所以我只需点击这里并输入对焦角色 And now our purple plane is perfectly lined up with our character 现在我们的紫色平面与我们的角色完美对齐 let's talk about aiming our camera at our actor 让我们谈谈如何将相机对准我们的角色 So I'm just going to delete all of the transform data here and show you how 所以我要删除这里的所有变换数据，并向你展示如何做到这一点 we can do this completely from scratch 我们可以完全从头开始做到这一点 So I'm going to take our Cine Camera actor 所以我要拿出我们的Cine Camera角色 Let's add in a new transformation track 让我们添加一个新的变换轨道 but now we can create some 但现在我们可以创建一些 new key frames 新的关键帧 So we just have our first key frame here 所以我们这里只有第一个关键帧 but a really fun way to plot 但有一个非常有趣的绘图方式 out your key frames is to pilot your camera 绘制关键帧的一个非常有趣的方法是操纵你的相机 So an important distinction here 所以这里有一个重要的区别 there's these two camera icons 有这两个相机图标 We've already used the camera icon next to the camera cuts track 我们已经使用了相机剪辑轨道旁边的相机图标 And now if you right click in the viewport 现在如果你在视口中右键点击 you'll see that we can't move our camera 你会发现我们无法移动我们的相机 But if we pilot the camera 但如果我们操纵相机 not the camera cut this way 不是通过相机剪辑 we can actually 我们实际上可以 move our viewport around 移动我们的视口 And if we have auto key frame set up 如果我们设置了自动关键帧 it'll start creating key frames 它将开始创建关键帧 for our location and rotation settings 为我们的位置和旋转设置 So now it's really easy to scrub through the timeline here and start 所以现在在这里轻松地浏览时间轴并开始 to reframe our camera 重新定格我们的相机 And it'll automatically key frame between the two animations 它将自动在两个动画之间设置关键帧 So at least this way we can block out a camera really quickly 所以至少这样我们可以很快地阻挡相机 And then you can go in to start refining your key frames by dragging them 然后你可以开始通过拖动来优化你的关键帧 moving them left and right by hitting control and left right to 通过按住控制键和左右箭头将它们左右移动 nudge key frames left and right 微调关键帧的左右位置 And also by using the curve editor to refine the shape and animation of 还可以使用曲线编辑器来优化形状和动画 your different key frames 你的不同关键帧 I know we just went through a lot 我知道我们刚刚经历了很多事情 but hopefully this gets you up and 但希望这能帮助你 running using this project file 使用这个项目文件运行起来 Try out different animations effects and the lighting scenarios by using fog and 通过使用雾和不同的动画效果和照明场景来尝试一下 lights in interesting ways and changing the time of day and the light 以有趣的方式使用灯光，并改变白天的时间和光线 direction completely and start opening up the different Niagara particle
